schema.description:
Response body for the bulk session management endpoint. Reports how many
rows the call processed and, for the wildcard variant, whether the network
still has matching rows left. Explicit-IDs requests always return
`more: false`. Wildcard callers drain the network by re-issuing the same
request while `more` is `true`.

more.description:
True when the call reached the per-call batch limit and additional
matching rows may remain. Always false for explicit-IDs requests.

processed.description:
Number of sessions processed in this call. For `disable`, counts only
sessions that were active before the call (already-inactive sessions
are skipped). For `delete`, counts every matching row removed.

schema.title: Manage Sessions Response

schema.description: The standard Ory JSON API error format.

debug.description: Debug contains debug information. This is usually not available and has to be enabled.
debug.example: The database adapter was unable to find the element

error.example: The requested resource could not be found

error_description.description: Description contains further information on the nature of the error.
error_description.example: Object with ID 12345 does not exist

id.description:
ID is a unique error ID.
feature_not_available ErrFeatureNotAvailable
quota_exceeded ErrQuotaExceeded

status_code.description: Code represents the error status code (404, 403, 401, ...).

schema.title: JSON API Error Response
